race.comment: FIVE OF A KIND (12) found the line nicely second-up with a slashing second over 1600m at this track in a solid rating contest. Gets a similar set-up for this with the winkers going on. Ready to win. FLYING PARTY (2) covered plenty of ground in the run with a battling fifth over this trip at Newcastle. Blinkers added this time and he gets every chance from the inside draw. HOLD MY DRINK (7) jumps in grade today on the home track and can take control early. Shouldered the 59kg with a gritty second over 1280m at Canberra Acton. Hard fit and must be kept safe. GLAMOUR MAGIC (13) fourth-up for this and held on well in the going when third over 1300m at Hawkesbury in the heavy (8) going. Well drawn and capable of taking this out.
